<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis\CuckooFilter; use Predis\Command\Command as RedisCommand; /** * @see https://redis.io/commands/cf.exists/ * * Check if an item exists in a Cuckoo Filter key. */ class CFEXISTS extends RedisCommand { public function getId() { return 'CF.EXISTS'; } }
